## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run smoke`
- [ ] `FREE_WEB_SMOKE_MODE=disabled FREE_WEB_SMOKE_ALLOW_OFFLINE=1 bun run smoke` (if relevant)

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs/README for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for notable changes.
- [ ] I added/updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I confirmed this PR does not expose secrets.

## Notes for reviewers

Any caveats, follow-ups, or migration notes.
